artPrompt: A widescreen film-still of a meeting erupting into open flame in a chaotic town square at night, an overturned table and scattered folding chairs bursting into a roaring fireball that hurls embers skyward, a goblin silhouette flung backward by the blast; confetti and sparks cyclone through the night-black smoke, rioting figures scattering in flame orange light, explosive civic mayhem, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Town Hall Tantrum
text:
Roll a six-sided die. Town Hall Tantrum deals damage equal to the result to any target.
If you control a Goblin, add 1 to that result. If you rolled a 6, also create a 1/1 red Voter creature token, because the people are fired up.
flavorText: The meeting was adjourned on account of fire.
